page_title: SOSKILL x EVANGELION Super Movable Assembly Blind Box
text:
is a line of blind box toys produced by SOSKILL Toys that was released on January 2026. The line was based on the Rebuild of Evangelion film series. There are 6 regular figures and one rare in the line. Each figure is Approximately 11 centimeters and includes a weapon set that can fitted into a "hanging ring" on its back, allowing you to carry it in a bag.
